data.name: Sexcraft - Sofiya and the Lewd Clan
data.detailed_description:
After Sofiya got tired of following the rules of the clan she was in, she decided to start a journey to become a powerful witch in the kingdom.

Features


  • Play a classic platform game;
  • Fuck your opponent;
  • Watch fluid sexual animations;
  • Collect sexual books to unlock special scenes;
data.about_the_game:
After Sofiya got tired of following the rules of the clan she was in, she decided to start a journey to become a powerful witch in the kingdom.

data.short_description: Play as Sofiya, Defeat monsters, Become a powerful witch and Have sex along the way. Can you beat her old master?

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10
  • 處理器: Intel Core2 Duo or Better
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 Capable GPU
  • 儲存空間: 280 MB 可用空間
